name: HMS ML 847 (ML 847)
events: 20 Aug 1944 Around 0730 FG/20, the destroyer HMAS Norman (Cdr. H.J. Buchanan DSO, RAN) departed Trincomalee to make rendezvous with the escort carrier HMS Atheling (A/Cdr. H.L. Oliver, RN) and the motor launch HMS ML 847 (?) coming from Madras which they had departed the previous day.
They arrived at Trincomalee around 1800 FG/20. (1)
